title: DECOMPOSE component/technique extraction template
author: Cristea, Ioana Alina
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Template and associated codebook used by the research team for the component/technique identification and extraction for the DECOMPOSE project (Disentangling psychological interventions for mental disorders into a taxonomy of active ingredients)
